sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n54189" key="kataklw=qes" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατακλῶθες</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">αἱ</gen>, <sense id="n54189.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the Spinners</tr_>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κλῶθες</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
